nasb.text: Now it came about after these things that Naboth the Jezreelite had a vineyard which was in Jezreel beside the palace of Ahab king of Samaria.

esv.text: Now Naboth the Jezreelite had a vineyard in Jezreel, beside the palace of Ahab king of Samaria.

cnv.text: 耶斯列人拿伯在耶斯列有一個葡萄園，靠近撒瑪利亞王亞哈的王宮。

ccb.text: 这事以后，又发生了一件事。耶斯列人拿伯有个葡萄园，在撒玛利亚的亚哈王宫附近。
